title: SQL: overflow values silently truncated to 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rawtriples (id Int32 NOT NULL, subjns Int32 NOT NULL, subjlname String NOT NULL, predns Int32 NOT NULL, predlname String NOT NULL, objns Int32 NOT NULL, objlname String NOT NULL, objlabelhash Int32, objlang String, objlabel String, objisliteral UInt8);
INSERT INTO rawtriples VALUES(1001, 1, '100168990', 2, 'glossaryEntry', 0, '', -5342185907394955428, NULL, 'adorning with mosaic', 1);
SELECT id, subjns, predns, objlabelhash, objisliteral FROM rawtriples WHERE objlabelhash IS NULL;
ALTER TABLE rawtriples UPDATE objlabelhash = -1 WHERE id = 1001;
key_bug_features: Overflow values truncated to zero during SQL insert
